UNH’s trend remains positive: price sits 2.424549120275739 ATR14 above SMA50 [P9.stretch_sma50_atr] and 7.348971877541222 ATR14 above SMA200 [P9.stretch_sma200_atr]. It is also 1.0655844268263202 ATR14 above SMA20 [P9.stretch_sma20_atr], leaving a constructive but extended near-term setup.

RSI14 at 62.3616391587923 [P2.rsi14] signals firm momentum without a pack-defined climax; the climax flag is false [P9.climax]. However, MACD at 7.351916046255894 [P2.macd] is below its 8.24635444972464 signal [P2.macd_signal], indicating momentum has softened despite the broader uptrend.

The session’s 1.196 ATR move [P0.move_vs_atr] occurred on 1.078 times average volume [P0.rel_volume], so participation was only modestly above normal. Volatility remains meaningful: ATR14 is 12.80658731156944 [P2.atr14] and 30-day sigma is 1.5915761158031443% [P2.sigma30].

KEY POINTS:
- Trend is positive above all major moving averages.
- Momentum is constructive but MACD warrants near-term caution.
- Volatility supports using ATR-based risk levels.
